name: Beth Vanderwood
alt_names: ベス・バンダーウッド
description: Beth Vanderwood (ベス・バンダーウッド Besu Bandāuddo) is a Mage of the Mermaid Heel Guild. Beth's Magic seems to be related to the use of vegetables. Unlike Droy's form of Plant Magic however, which is Holder-type, Beth's form is Caster-type.  (Source: Fairy Tail Wikia)
